message:
feat(stdlib): Add pathlib, shutil, and glob modules

pathlib (Lib/pathlib.zig):
- Path class with comprehensive methods
- name, stem, suffix for path components
- exists, is_file, is_dir, is_symlink checks
- read_text, write_text, read_bytes, write_bytes
- mkdir, mkdir_parents, unlink, rmdir, rename
- iterdir, parts, parent, join
- with_suffix, with_name transformations
- absolute, resolve path resolution

shutil (Lib/shutil.zig):
- copy, copy2, copyfile for file copying
- copytree for recursive directory copy
- move with rename fallback
- rmtree for recursive deletion
- which for command lookup
- get_terminal_size

glob (Lib/glob.zig):
- fnmatch with *, ?, [abc], [!abc], [a-z] support
- glob for pattern expansion
- iglob (alias to glob)
- escape and has_magic utilities

All modules include tests.
